'''âl-d-p''' ('''kaladap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calefie|calefie]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-d-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calefie|calefie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-d-p
|-
! Lemma
| kaladap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiladap|thiladap]] || [[word:jiladap|jiladap]] || [[word:shiladap|shiladap]] || [[word:kiladap|kiladap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuladap|thuthuladap]] || [[word:jujuladap|jujuladap]] || [[word:shushuladap|shushuladap]] || [[word:kukuladap|kukuladap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuladap|thuladap]] || [[word:juladap|juladap]] || [[word:shuladap|shuladap]] || [[word:kuladap|kuladap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuladap|thuladap]] || [[word:juladap|juladap]] || [[word:shuladap|shuladap]] || [[word:kuladap|kuladap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theladap|theladap]] || [[word:jeladap|jeladap]] || [[word:sheladap|sheladap]] || [[word:keladap|keladap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholadap|thotholadap]] || [[word:jojoladap|jojoladap]] || [[word:shosholadap|shosholadap]] || [[word:kokoladap|kokoladap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholadap|tholadap]] || [[word:joladap|joladap]] || [[word:sholadap|sholadap]] || [[word:koladap|koladap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholadap|tholadap]] || [[word:joladap|joladap]] || [[word:sholadap|sholadap]] || [[word:koladap|koladap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠladap|thĂŠladap]] || [[word:jĂŠladap|jĂŠladap]] || [[word:shĂŠladap|shĂŠladap]] || [[word:kĂŠladap|kĂŠladap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathaladap|thathaladap]] || [[word:jajaladap|jajaladap]] || [[word:shashaladap|shashaladap]] || [[word:kakaladap|kakaladap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thaladap|thaladap]] || [[word:jaladap|jaladap]] || [[word:shaladap|shaladap]] || [[word:kaladap|kaladap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thaladap|thaladap]] || [[word:jaladap|jaladap]] || [[word:shaladap|shaladap]] || [[word:kaladap|kaladap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shaladap|shaladap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshaladap|goshaladap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishaladap|gokishaladap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shaladapnĂŒ|shaladapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshaladapnknĂŒ|goshaladapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishaladapnĂŒ|gokishaladapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shaladapshĂ«|shaladapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshaladapnkshĂ«|goshaladapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishaladapshĂ«|gokishaladapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaladapro|shaladapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaladapnkro|goshaladapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaladapro|gokishaladapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shaladapmu|shaladapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaladapnkmu|goshaladapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaladapmu|gokishaladapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shaladapsher|shaladapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshaladapnksher|goshaladapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishaladapsher|gokishaladapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shaladapng|shaladapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshaladapnkng|goshaladapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishaladapng|gokishaladapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shaladapya|shaladapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshaladapnkya|goshaladapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishaladapya|gokishaladapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shaladapyam|shaladapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshaladapnkyam|goshaladapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishaladapyam|gokishaladapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaladapnĂŒshĂ«|shaladapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaladapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshaladapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaladapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishaladapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaladapnĂŒro|shaladapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaladapnknĂŒro|goshaladapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaladapnĂŒro|gokishaladapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaladapnĂŒmu|shaladapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaladapnknĂŒmu|goshaladapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaladapnĂŒmu|gokishaladapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaladapshĂ«nĂŒ|shaladapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaladapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshaladapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaladapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishaladapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaladapshĂ«ro|shaladapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaladapnkshĂ«ro|goshaladapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaladapshĂ«ro|gokishaladapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaladapshĂ«mu|shaladapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaladapnkshĂ«mu|goshaladapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaladapshĂ«mu|gokishaladapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaladapronĂŒ|shaladapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaladapnkronĂŒ|goshaladapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaladapronĂŒ|gokishaladapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaladaproshĂ«|shaladaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaladapnkroshĂ«|goshaladapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaladaproshĂ«|gokishaladaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaladapromu|shaladapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaladapnkromu|goshaladapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaladapromu|gokishaladapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaladapmunĂŒ|shaladapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaladapnkmunĂŒ|goshaladapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaladapmunĂŒ|gokishaladapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaladapmushĂ«|shaladapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaladapnkmushĂ«|goshaladapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaladapmushĂ«|gokishaladapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaladapmuro|shaladapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaladapnkmuro|goshaladapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaladapmuro|gokishaladapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
